name: Standard Chartered Ultimate Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5X Reward Points on all retail purchases

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹50,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas

additionalBenefits: Flat 5X rewards on ALL spends - no category restrictions
Transfer points to airline and hotel partners
Priority Pass membership for lounge access
pros: Flat 5X rewards on ALL spends with no category restrictions
Points transferable to airline and hotel partners
Simple reward structure - no need to track categories
cons: Per-point value of ₹0.50 could be higher
StanC has limited branch presence in India
6 international lounge visits may not suffice for frequent travellers
idealFor: Users who want consistently high rewards without tracking spend categories
Travellers looking for strong lounge access and airline mile transfers

faqs.question: What makes the Ultimate card unique?
faqs.answer: The standout feature is the flat 5X reward rate on ALL retail purchases - no category restrictions or caps on base rewards. Most cards offer high multipliers only on specific categories.

faqs.question: Which airlines can I transfer points to?
faqs.answer: StanC Ultimate points can be transferred to select airline and hotel partners. Check the SC Rewards 360 portal for the current partner list and transfer ratios.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹5,000 annual fee is waived on spending ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year.

faqs.question: How does lounge access work?
faqs.answer: You get unlimited domestic lounge access and 6 international lounge visits per year via Priority Pass and Visa Infinite lounge programs.
